penalties.description: Task appears incomplete as the loop tail was not cut inside the trainer and the knot security cannot be confirmed at completion.

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude reports incomplete task with no visible tail cut or knot security confirmation, while GPT reports completed task with minor positioning penalty. Given the fundamental disagreement on completion status and Claude's specific concerns about missing final phases, the conservative approach is to score as incomplete until completion can be definitively confirmed.
